message:
test(pt-config,pt-core): expand no-mock coverage for preset, submodular, curve, sequential, active_sensing, dispatch

New tests: preset (53), submodular (23), curve (12), sequential (12),
active_sensing (16), dispatch (4) = 120 new tests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
